title: monardella undulata
intro: Monardella undulata, also known as the Purple Sage or Catmint Sage, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of essential oils such as thymol and carvacrol. The medicinal properties of Monardella undulata have been shown to have health benefits including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Monardella undulata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
